teaser: Toy Story 5 merchandise launches today. Parks operating normally with typical spring crowds.

bignews.title: Toy Story 5 Merchandise Collection Launches Today
bignews.body: Disney Consumer Products has released an extensive line of Toy Story 5 products ahead of the film's June 19 theatrical release. The collection includes interactive figures from Mattel that recognize and talk to each other, new characters like Lilypad and Smarty Pants, LEGO playsets, collectibles from Funko and POP MART, and accessories from Crocs, Away, and Pandora. Products are available now at various retailers with additional items launching through June.

topstories.title: Interactive Toy Story 5 Figures Now Available
topstories.body: Mattel's new Toy Story 5 Playscale Interactables bring tech-enhanced play to the franchise. Figures of Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Lilypad, and Forky each feature iconic phrases and can recognize and respond to each other when placed together. The collection reflects the film's theme of toy meet tech.

topstories.title: LeapFrog Debuts Interactive Lilypad Toy
topstories.body: The new Explore & Learn Lilypad from LeapFrog lets kids interact with Toy Story 5's newest character through educational games focused on letters, numbers, and problem-solving. The device also allows children to send text messages to Toy Story characters using emojis and preset messages.

topstories.title: Jessie-Inspired Crocs Boots Coming This Summer
topstories.body: Crocs will launch Toy Story 5-themed boots inspired by Jessie's Western wear starting June 16. The boots feature denim and cow print collars, red trim with white lacing, and four Jessie-themed Jibbitz charms. The collection will be available on crocs.com and in select retail locations.

icymi.title: Away Travel Collection Arrives June 9
icymi.body: Away will launch a Toy Story 5 travel collection on June 9 featuring luggage, backpacks, and bag charms for kids and adults. Designs showcase Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, the Aliens, and newcomer Lilypad across the full range of travel accessories.

icymi.title: Pandora Toy Story Jewelry Coming May 21
icymi.body: Pandora will release a Toy Story collection on May 21 including a Sheriff Star Bracelet with blue and brown leather and an embossed star charm inspired by Woody. The collection will be available at us.pandora.net and select retail locations.

spotlight.title: Planning Your Summer Park Visit
spotlight.body: With Toy Story 5 arriving in theaters June 19, expect increased guest interest in Toy Story attractions across all Disney parks. Magic Kingdom's Buzz Lightyear's Space Ranger Spin and Hollywood Studios' Toy Story Land will likely see higher demand. Book dining reservations and Lightning Lane selections early for the best experience.
